description: CO2-C3 VLE based on Reamer, Sage & Lacey (1951) conditions
source: Reamer, H.H., Sage, B.H., & Lacey, W.N. (1951). Ind. Eng. Chem., 43(11), 2515-2520

mi_settings.notes: Expected values are PR-EOS computed (not raw experimental). Conditions from 100F, 500 psia data point.

expected.notes: PR-EOS with zero BIPs. CO2 preferentially in vapor phase. Literature shows similar trends but differs without BIP tuning.
